programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ethiopia: Land of Extremes
programme.desc: Landlocked and surrounded by five countries, Ethiopia is one of east Africa's forgotten lands. Seemingly passive deserts in fact seethe with fire, and cloud-piercing peaks shield a secret Eden of canyons and cliff-tops teeming with life.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.
programme.sub-title: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.
programme.sub-title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: The Andes: World in the Clouds
programme.desc: The longest chain of mountains in the world, the Andes run the length of western South America and dictate the climate for the whole continent. They include some of the highest peaks outside the Himalayas.
programme.sub-title: The Andes: World in the Clouds

programme.title: Wildest India: Thar Desert: Sacred Sands
programme.desc: Covering 200,000 km sq, India's Thar desert is one of the harshest places on Earth. Desiccating winds and near permanent drought has earned this unforgiving land another name: the region of death.

programme.title: Wildest India: Ganges: River of Life
programme.desc: Then watch, the longest river in India, The Ganges. It's a lifeline to wild animals, from rhinoceros and river dolphins to otters and gharials.

programme.title: Wildest India: The Himalayas: Surviving the Summits
programme.desc: The Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India. he Himalayas' rugged highlands offer little direct refuge to humans, in the shadow below, over a billion people in India rely on the mountains for survival.

programme.title: Wildest India: Western Ghats: Monsoon Mountains
programme.desc: See how the Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India.The Himalayas' highlands offer little direct refuge to humans. /Then, learn about the western Ghats. A spine of mountains that lay claim to being one of the most bio-diverse places in the world.

programme.title: Wildest India: India's Lost World
programme.desc: North-east India is an anthropological paradise; there is no other place on Earth with so many different ethnic groups. The forest are filled with mysterious tribes whose lives are dictated by the rain and the seasonal fruits of the forest.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Okavango: Water in the Desert
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta, a huge emerald oasis in the burning heart of the Kalahari desert, is fed by the Okavango River and this perpetual cycle of wet and dry is the lifeblood of this extraordinary natural Eden.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Namibia: Sands of Time
programme.desc: Namibia is an arid, rough land. However, it has been inhabited for thousands of years, by people as well as animals, and shows no sign of losing popularity with either.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire
programme.desc: Ngorongoro is thought to have formed about 2.5 million years ago from a large volcano, whose cone collapsed inward after a major eruption. This fertile land is full of wildlife, from cunning hyena and proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Zambezi: Wild Water
programme.desc: The Zambezi is one of Africa's most influential rivers. It supports some of the continent's most spectacular wildlife. However, the Zambezi's long and winding journey destroys, as well as creates.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Nile: An African Odyssey
programme.desc: The Nile is the longest river in the world. Ancient Egypt, one of the history's most powerful civilizations, depended hugely upon it. Each year, it flooded, replenishing the fields with fertile silt. This automatic irrigation fueled Egypt's economy.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire
programme.desc: It's home to some of the world's most iconic animals  including the African great apes.
programme.sub-title: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: The story of the first major battle of the American phase of the Vietnam War, and the soldiers on both sides that fought it. Feat: Mel Gibson.

programme.title: Open Windows
programme.desc: A jilted fan soon finds himself pulled into a deadly game of cat-and-mouse after he accepts the opportunity to spy on his favorite actress via his laptop.

programme.title: The Lazarus Effect
programme.desc: A group of medical students discover a way to bring dead patients back to life.

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: Life of a king
programme.desc: The film tells the true story of Eugene Brown, an ex-convict who starts the Big Chair Chess Club.

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Secret Agent Super Dragon
programme.desc: A secret agent tries to stop a drug lord from taking over the world with hallucinogenic chewing gum.

programme.title: Swamp Diamonds
programme.desc: An undercover police woman infiltrates a group of hardened female criminals who plan to break out of prison and retrieve diamonds from a swamp.

programme.title: Danger Death Ray
programme.desc: Danger Death Ray: A slick secret agent investigates an evil organization that stole a top secret death ray.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: A dour production of Shakespeare’s play produced for German TV. A prince returns home for his father’s funeral and doesn’t like what he finds.

programme.title: The Black Scorpion
programme.desc: Giant scorpions rise out of a volcano and attack Mexico in The Black Scorpion.

programme.title: The Rebel Set
programme.desc: Three coffee shop customers help an owner rob an armored car.

programme.title: Samson vs. The Vampire Women
programme.desc: While Mike and the Bots wrestle with Samson vs. the Vampire Women, TV's Frank is assumed into Second Banana Heaven.

programme.title: Manhunt In Space
programme.desc: Manhunt In Space: An early episode of the soap opera behemoth General Hospital plus a movie made of several TV episodes about space pirates.

programme.title: Beginning of the End
programme.desc: A swarm of giant grasshoppers, inadvertently created by a radioactive experiment, heads for Chicago.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower
programme.desc: The kids ignore Rosebuds warning and summon Bloody Marty from the ominous mirror world.
programme.sub-title: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!
programme.desc: McGee and Buttsquat go head-to-head in an 80's style arcade game! But as the points build up, the boys become digitized inside the game. The kids head back through the Lakebottom inter-dimensional portal, hoping to find a Sasquatch version of the camp.
programme.sub-title: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Jaws of Old Toothy / Arachnattack

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Slaybells / Smells Like Holidays

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Mc Crossroads / Lucky Duck

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Big Top Terror / Slimal Fear
programme.desc: The campers summon Armand's old rival, Doofus the clown who vows to destroy the campers.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Last Days / Knock on Wood
programme.desc: McGee tries to save Camp Lakebottom from being overtaken by the Grim Camper.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Butt-Squad / You Sank My Battle-Squirt!
programme.desc: Buttsquat steps in to help the bottomdwellers when they suddenly acquire the same red hair and freckles as their Sunny Smiles nemesis. When an alien invasion threatens Camp Lakebottom, the kids defend the camp against the alien mothership!

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 59
programme.desc: Myths tested: How easy is it to crack a safe? Can a hole be easily cut into a pane of glass without setting off a sound alarm?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 48
programme.desc: Myths tested: What caused a plane to be shredded? Can a fire be started by rubbing sticks together, with a bullet or with ice?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 65
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a working glider be made out of concrete? Can an engine run on gunpowder alone?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 218
programme.desc: Can two men carrying a pane of glass survive unscathed if a car smashes through it? Can a rocket-propelled grenade explosion flip an SUV?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 25
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to make a catapult with a boom-lift cherry-picker? Does a person save more gas by driving with the AC on instead of having the windows down?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 89
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to walk on water? Can a speeding arrow be snatched out of the air? Can a sword be stopped with one's bare hands?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 223
programme.desc: Do males prefer women with blonde hair? Do pheromone sprays work? Are women attracted to wealthy men? Do men give larger tips to women with larger breasts?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 38
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to slingshot a person over the border and onto a mattress?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 197
programme.desc: Can you jump to safety from a collapsing rope bridge as seen in the film "Cliffhanger"? Can a strong enough hailstorm sink a boat?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 127
programme.desc: Will driving a convertible faster in the rain help a person stay drier than stopping and putting the top on? Can popcorn be cooked with lasers or explosions?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 42
programme.desc: Myths tested: Could the Ancient Chinese have used drums to listen for tunneling invaders? Is the five second rule true?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 186
programme.desc: Can a pallet of duct tape help you survive on a deserted island?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 90
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can someone's hat be shot off? Is it possible to break someone out of jail with horses? Can an airbag turn a lock-pick into a lethal spear?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 17
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a marching battalion take down a bridge? Is it possible to make a "magic bullet" out of ice?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 189
programme.desc: Can a vehicle run as well on square wheels as it does on round ones? Can two cars stuck nose to nose really do the maneuvers shown in the film "Date Night?"

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 185
programme.desc: Is it possible to re-inflate a flat tire and re-seat it on its rim? How effective are various handgun firing stances?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 183
programme.desc: Can excavators row a barge, take you wakeboarding or do acrobatics? Can you patch the fuselage of a plane with duct tape?

programme.title: Fear Factor: Buried Alive, Rat & Snake Water Escape
programme.desc: A contestant is placed in a coffin, lowered into a grave, and their partner must free them. The contestants will be placed into a 7-foot deep Plexiglas tank divided into two sections and filled with water in this episode, part 1 of a Psycho-theme special!
programme.sub-title: Buried Alive, Rat & Snake Water Escape

programme.title: Fear Factor: Hearse Slide, Psycho Shower Rescue
programme.desc: In a couples' stunt, a hearse with a standing platform replacing the rear bumper will be used. One contestant will be handcuffed to a shower inside a bathroom at the Bates Motel in this episode, part 2 of Fear Factor's Psycho special!

programme.title: Fear Factor: Exploding Room, Eating Camel Spiders
programme.desc: Contestants will be trapped in a nightmare office and eat camel spiders as well as perform timed escapes from straitjackets in this episode, part 3 of Fear Factor's Psycho-themed special!

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Platform To Platform Jump, Fear Factor Barbershop, Container Launch
programme.desc: Contestants pair up with complete strangers to maneuver a speeding boat beneath a helicopter and escape a small cage submerged in freezing water.
programme.sub-title: Heli Platform To Platform Jump, Fear Factor Barbershop, Container Launch

programme.title: Fear Factor: Ledge Piggy Back, Mother's Kitchen, Under The Semi Sunroof Escape
programme.desc: Parents make their way across the ledge at Universal Orlando while their children stand on their shoulders. Mother-son teams must retrieve keys. Contestants sit in a car and must lock it into position underneath a moving semi-truck.
programme.sub-title: Ledge Piggy Back, Mother's Kitchen, Under The Semi Sunroof Escape

programme.title: Fear Factor: Chair Launch Heli Partner Pluck, Alligator Frog Box, Quad Off Pier
programme.desc: One contestant will launch herself from a pneumatic chair into water. One contestant will drop from a helicopter and swim over to a buoy with a key on it and more in this "Freaks vs. Geeks" episode of Fear Factor.
programme.sub-title: Chair Launch Heli Partner Pluck, Alligator Frog Box, Quad Off Pier

programme.title: Fear Factor: Demolition Derby, Swamp Course
programme.desc: Reality stars: Part 1! Five contestants will be seated in derby cars while their partners balance on top of 30-foot poles. The contestants will also maneuver a swamp boat using a gondolier's staff through a swamp obstacle course.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Houseboat Rescue, Submerged Bug Box Escape
programme.desc: Reality stars, part 2! Contestants will both start on a SeaDoo as they speed towards a buoy, jump off at the buoy, grab a floating fire extinguisher, and swim to a platform behind a house boat that is on fire in one dangerous stunt.
programme.sub-title: Houseboat Rescue, Submerged Bug Box Escape

programme.title: Fear Factor: A Car Crane Collision, Spider Dive
programme.desc: Both contestants are trapped in cars that are each suspended by cranes opposing each other. The female contestant will be locked to a conveyer belt that will be lowered into a shaft filled with hundreds of webs crawling with thousands of tarantulas.
programme.sub-title: A Car Crane Collision, Spider Dive

programme.title: Fear Factor: Light House Zip Line and Heli Drop, Dr.Doom Partner Target Swing, Stationary Electrical Fish Bike, Car Maze Orlando
programme.desc: Family fear factor! Child contestants will stand on top of a light tower while their parents hang from a helicopter among other bone-chilling stunts.
programme.sub-title: Light House Zip Line and Heli Drop, Dr.Doom Partner Target Swing, Stationary Electrical Fish Bike, Car Maze Orlando

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dual Reverse Heli Bungee, Military Crate Drop, HeliSemi Plunge
programme.desc: Military edition! Contestants are strapped to a line on the deck, with their bungees attached to a helicopter. Contestants will cut their way through two separate ropes. Contestants are connected to a helicopter and must repel down.
programme.sub-title: Dual Reverse Heli Bungee, Military Crate Drop, HeliSemi Plunge

programme.title: Fear Factor: Fireboat Heli Net Climb, Fire Torch Toss and Drink, Fire Slide
programme.desc: In this fire-themed episode, the contestants must face some of the hottest stunts yet, literally.
programme.sub-title: Fireboat Heli Net Climb, Fire Torch Toss and Drink, Fire Slide

programme.title: Fear Factor: Flying High, Junkyard Canine Attack, Vertical Bus Drop
programme.desc: Contestants are harnessed and locked into a computer ratchet system. Couples will make their way through junkyard obstacles, retrieving hubcaps. The male contestants will be standing on top of a bus while their female partners are strapped under the bus.
programme.sub-title: Flying High, Junkyard Canine Attack, Vertical Bus Drop

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tug Of War, Roach Cage Escape, Barrels Off Truck
programme.desc: It's age vs. youth in this special episode! Contestants will be sealed into a cage filled with roaches. The cage will be locked on the outside. Contestants will also drive behind a truck while their opponents are releasing barrels to distract them.
programme.sub-title: Tug Of War, Roach Cage Escape, Barrels Off Truck

programme.title: Fear Factor: Hurricane Ledge Walk, Roach Bob and Eat, Raging Waters
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a building ledge as a wind and rain storm inhibits their movement. Contestants must bob their heads into a container to retrieve cockroaches with their mouth. Couples will be on their stomachs on a flash flood set.
programme.sub-title: Hurricane Ledge Walk, Roach Bob and Eat, Raging Waters

programme.title: Fear Factor: Body Weights, Picnic Basket, Train Drag
programme.desc: Special blind date episode! Couples will be presented with a picnic baskets filled with a Fear Factor style meal. One contestant will be underneath the train at the back of a car, while her partner will be on the side of the same car.
programme.sub-title: Body Weights, Picnic Basket, Train Drag

programme.title: Fear Factor: Pig Pen, Rotisserie Chicken In A Basket, Tractor Pull and Escape
programme.desc: Stunts takes place in a rectangular pig pen filled with pigs. A couple is placed back-to back and attached to an upright rotisserie. One contestant will be dragged through a field of mud.
programme.sub-title: Pig Pen, Rotisserie Chicken In A Basket, Tractor Pull and Escape

programme.title: Fear Factor: Boat Lean and Grab, Scorpion Helmet Spin, Truck Switch
programme.desc: Ex Factor! Contestants must grab scorpions, cross a balance beam on a moving boat, and plow through obstacles with a twist: Their partners will be their exes.
programme.sub-title: Boat Lean and Grab, Scorpion Helmet Spin, Truck Switch

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dual Dunk, Isolation Barrel, Car Mine Field
programme.desc: Celebrity edition! Contestants will hang by their ankles from a crane above the water. Contestants must also drive on a swervy course while trying to run through a series of barrels and wooden structures.
programme.sub-title: Dual Dunk, Isolation Barrel, Car Mine Field

programme.title: Fear Factor: Descender Jump/Eat Sheep's Eye/Water Tank
programme.desc: Contestant will hang from a bar placed outside a 12th story window and drop by a descender line. Each contestant will be asked to eat three sheep's eyes in three minutes. Each contestant is lowered by their feet head first into a water tank.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Sunk
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey hire a helicopter for a salvage mission to retrieve the rare tailpiece from a Lockheed 10-A that crashed in the Yellowknife woods forty years ago. It's a personal quest for Joe; he flew that plane at the beginning of his career.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Turkey or Bust
programme.desc: Justin and Cory are stranded in Croatia while trying to complete the delivery of two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey. Metal rock band Iron Maiden's lead singer Bruce Dickinson flies Buffalo's DC-3 from Edmonton to Yellowknife.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Cold Start
programme.desc: Mikey links up with Chris Hadfield aboard the International Space Station. Problems mount while trying to get a frozen DC-4 airborne. A landing gear collapse on the runway sends the entire crew scrambling.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Snowplane
programme.desc: Joe races a quirky antique snowmobile - with an airplane engine and no brakes. The water bomber crew struggles to get two planes out of Turkey. Cocky rampie Chris Staples tries to prove himself in the C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Gear Lock
programme.desc: A cold snap triggers massive challenges. Devan runs into gear problems while he ferries a mothballed DC-3 across the country. And Justin has to make a snap decision with his newborn son aboard his plane.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Aussie Ace
programme.desc: The Electra returns from repairs and the crew takes it right back to the ice strip that it set off from before the crash landing last year. Tyler works up the courage to confront Joe about a big decision. A hotshot Australian pilot tries to earn a job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Rock Stars and Rampies
programme.desc: Facing Joe's wrath, Rod and Cory head to the UK to make urgent water bomber repairs. David tries to prove himself to Devan in the C-46 but ends up infuriating Devan. Will makes an ultimatum in Hay River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Camp
programme.desc: Mikey trains for High Arctic survival with the Canadian Rangers. The Air Force invades Chuck's hangar. Joe faces tough competition at a California plane auction.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Frozen Solid
programme.desc: AJ and James battle a DC-4 engine fire. It's Joe's 69th birthday - and he's never flown a helicopter before, so Mikey plans a special gift of chopper flight lessons.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Power Crash
programme.desc: Cory, Chuck and Brian watch as a 5,000-pound power unit smash to the ground, denting the Electra and putting it out of commission. Mikey scrambles to manage the crisis while Joe races to England to try and purchase a backup Electra.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Breakdown
programme.desc: Co-pilot Graeme's fumbles his Electra training landings. Chris stresses over his C-46 check ride. Adam rescues a stranded C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Target Practice
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head to England to bring home a new plane. Devan does target-practice in the DC-4.James builds a Buffalo-style soapbox racer.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Air Show
programme.desc: Joe flies with the Snowbirds during the Hamilton air show and later teaches Mikey to fly. A surprise departure shakes up Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Five Seasons
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWT celebrates a milestone with a look back at the last five years, a peek behind the camera and reflections from the Buffalo crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: A Ball O'Snags
programme.desc: An engine fire and series of mechanical gremlins has Buffalo scrambling to make its Christmas deliveries. Newest rampie Prefkar Mony struggles with life in the North.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Storm
programme.desc: Buffalo's Electra aircraft is hammered by rough winds up the Mackenzie Valley. In Hay River, a rookie crew faces the worst ice storm in years and one rampie has a tough go trying to fit in at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Old Dogs
programme.desc: Engine trouble plagues Buffalo's newest Electra, ZFE, and a standoff between Joe and Transport Canada threatens to close the airline. At the same time, Joe faces a tough decision about his old dog Sophie.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Checkflight
programme.desc: Joe leaves to undergo medical tests at the Mayo Clinic in Phoenix, Arizona. Jeff and Sam stress over their DC-3 checkflights and Joe celebrates turning 70-his way.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Second Chances
programme.desc: Rookie pilot Jeff nearly runs off the runway. Prefkar learns to play hockey but drops the ball at Buffalo and Joe goes on a date with a real dog.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Trouble for Team 5D's
programme.desc: With Team Unicorn taking the early lead against Team 5D's, all eyes turn to Akiza as she takes to the track hoping to take down Andre and even up the score.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Edge of Elimination: Part I
programme.desc: With Jack and Akiza already defeated, Yusei finds himself having to defeat all three members of Team Unicorn on his own. Can Yusei come up with a comeback that will wrangle the win away from Team Unicorn?
programme.sub-title: The Edge of Elimination: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Edge of Elimination: Part II
programme.desc: Yusei must figure out a way to defeat all three members of Team Unicorn before his deck is drained of all its duel cards.
programme.sub-title: The Edge of Elimination: Part II

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Edge of Elimination: Part III
programme.desc: In the climactic conclusion to the first round of the World Racing Grand Prix, Yusei must figure out a way to defeat Team Catastrophe's captain before all the cards in his deck disappear.
programme.sub-title: The Edge of Elimination: Part III

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Party Crashers
programme.desc: After snatching victory from the jaws of defeat in the first round of the World Racing Grand Prix, Team 5D's celebrates their win and prepares for their next opponent Team Catastrophe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Knight Takes Pawn
programme.desc: In the second round of the World Racing Grand Prix, Crow of Team 5D's gets set to take on Team Catastrophe's Herman. Can Crow swoop in and swipe all of Herman's life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Rook Takes Knight
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Crow of Team 5D's looks to give Herman's Hook the Hidden Knight the heave-ho before it ruins his Runner and catapults Team Catastrophe into the next round.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Primos Plan: Part IV
programme.desc: With the safety of New Domino City hanging in the balance and Primo in control of Stardust Dragon, Yusei must figure out a way to get his go-to card back before his life points hit zero.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Primos Plan: Part V
programme.desc: It's the climactic conclusion to the battle between Yusei and Primo! Can Yusei defeat this menace and save his City, or will Primo prevail and send New Domino spiraling into chaos?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Eyes on the Prize
programme.desc: Yusei and Team 5D's get set to take on Team Ragnarok and their powerful Nordic Gods  Thor, Loki and Odin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Duel for Redemption
programme.desc: When Jack is informed by Team Ragnarok's Dragan that Director Goodwin fixed the match they had years earlier, Jack begins to doubt his Turbo Dueling talents. Can Jack kick things into overdrive?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Soul Solutions
programme.desc: Determined to defeat Dragan and his Nordic God, Jack summons a mighty new monster to the field that has enough fire power to send all of Dragan's life points up in smoke!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: When Nordic Gods Attack
programme.desc: With only a handful of life points remaining and the Nordic God, Thor, staring down at him, Jack gets set to take on his next opponent - Team Ragnarok's Broder!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Tricking the Trickster
programme.desc: After swooping in take on Team Ragnarok's Broder, Crow finds himself battling two Nordic Gods  Thor and Loki! Can Crow defeat these two dynamos, or will this dynamic duo prove to be too much for Crow and his battle-tested Blackwings?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Yusei's Last Stand
programme.desc: With the tournament on the line, Yusei must find a way to defeat Halldor before the three Nordic Gods knock his life points down to nothing!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Fight to the Finish Line
programme.desc: It's the exciting conclusion to the semifinal battle between Team Ragnarok and Team 5D's! Can Yusei Fudo muster a miracle comeback against Team Ragnarok's Halldor?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: The grand finale of the World Racing Grand Prix is set to start, and our two finalists -Team 5D's and Team New World - are ready to take center stage. For Yusei, Jack and Crow, second place isn't an option!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dawn of the Machines
programme.desc: It's one down and two to go for Team 5D's as Jack and his mighty Red Nova Dragon get set to take on and take out Primo and Jakob of Team New World!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Against All Odds
programme.desc: With Jack out of commission, all eyes turn to Crow as he swoops in to duel Jakob! Does Crow have what it takes to take down Team New World's best duelist, or will Crow suffer the same cruel fate that sent his teammate crashing into defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: For Synchro's Sake
programme.desc: With the safety of New Domino City hanging in the balance, Yusei Fudo from Team 5D's looks to rev it up against Team New World's Jakob in the final round of the World Racing Grand Prix!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Fight for the Future
programme.desc: After witnessing Jakob, Primo and Lester fuse together to form the all-powerful Aporia, Yusei must now figure out a way to defeat this formidable foe before he destroys New Domino City!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Victory or Doom
programme.desc: In the exciting conclusion to the World Racing Grand Prix, Yusei Fudo, facing his toughest opponent ever, must rev it up one last time if he hopes to defeat Aporia and save New Domino City from being destroyed!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Link into the VRAINS
programme.desc: When a nefarious group of hackers threatens to destroy the cyber world, one duelist is determined to stop them – Playmaker!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Seize the Wind!
programme.desc: The Knights of Hanoi have set their sights on stealing Playmaker’s AI – but he won’t give it up without a fight!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Contact
programme.desc: Yusaku’s AI holds countless secrets, and Yusaku is determined to uncover every one!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Pain and Gain
programme.desc: The Gore - LINK VRAINS’ biggest and boldest bruiser - is looking to pin Playmaker for the three count!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Down for the Count
programme.desc: Gore’s looking to suplex Playmaker into submission, but Playmaker’s not about to tap out!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: True Blue
programme.desc: Blue Angel hopes to give her fans something to scream about by defeating Playmaker, but after receiving a dangerous card from the Knights of Hanoi, her fans might be screaming for all the wrong reasons!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: Playmaker’s battle takes a dark and dangerous turn when a malicious virus infects Blue Angel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: A Storm is Coming
programme.desc: To cure Blue Angel, Playmaker must put Ai on the line.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Malicious Mayhem
programme.desc: Playmaker takes on Varis and learns there’s more to Ai than meets the eye!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: Varis and Playmaker raise the stakes when they put the brakes on their Speed Duel and battle it out in Master Duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Neutralized
programme.desc: Varis’ relentless onslaught continues as he pummels Playmaker into digital dust!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Link the Circuit
programme.desc: Playmaker’s duel with Varis reveals a link connecting his past to the present!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Playback
programme.desc: Frog and Pigeon plan an exclusive expose on Playmaker after Ghost Gal supplies them with the goods on Link VRAINS’ newest hero!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: An Invitation
programme.desc: Ghost Gal’s gained backdoor access to Sol Tech’s database and Playmaker’s ready to duel her for it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Camouflaged Chaos
programme.desc: Playmaker hacks into Sol Tech’s database in search of answers, but he finds trouble instead when he runs into a pair of destructive AIs!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Hack Attack
programme.desc: Blue Angel swoops in from the blue to save Playmaker from two AIs designed to destroy!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Blue’s Back!
programme.desc: Blue Angel continues her duel against an AI whose prime directives are: duel, decimate, delete!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Dueling for Answers
programme.desc: Playmaker battles Zaizen to unlock Sol Tech’s databank and the secrets to his past!

programme.title: Orgazmo
programme.desc: From the creators of South Park comes raunchy superhero sex comedy "Orgazmo," the story of mild-mannered Mormon Joe Young and his crime-fighting adult film alter-ego Orgazmo. Starring: Trey Parker, Matt Stone

programme.title: Swinging with the Finkels
programme.desc: A suburban couple decide to shake up their marriage by "swinging" with another couple. Starring: Martin Freeman, Mandy Moore, Jonathan Silverman, Jerry Stiller, Melissa George

programme.title: Super
programme.desc: After his wife falls under the influence of a drug dealer, an everyday guy transforms himself into Crimson Bolt, a superhero with the best intentions, but lacking in heroic skills.

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: Marilyn Hotchkiss' Ballroom Dancing & Charm School
programme.desc: A widowed man's life turns upside down when he embarks on a journey to find a dying man's long lost love.

programme.title: Perfect People
programme.desc: After many years of marriage, Ken and Barbara decide to radically change their way of living. In order to become more attractive, they submit themselves to modern diets, exercise, and plastic surgery.

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: Keep The Aspidistra Flying
programme.desc: When successful advertiser, Gordon Comstock (Richard E. Grant), abruptly walks away from his career to pursue his dream of being a poet, his path is much more difficult than expected and soon financial problems begin to pile up.

programme.title: Unicorn City
programme.desc: To prove leadership skills to a potential employer, Voss, a hardcore gamer entices his gamer buddies to create a utopia, but paradise is disrupted when his former nemesis and guild master decides to wage war for the city and the heart of Voss’ true love.

programme.title: Killing Dad
programme.desc: One of the all-time great British black comedies! A man goes looking for his long lost dad – only to meet a voracious older woman who is, apparently, the sex bomb of Southend.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Buried under the location Sean investigates tonight, is the bones of the deceased and it appears that they are at unrest. Will Sean solve the mystery of who is haunting this location?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Not a Very Fun Day at The Beech Caves
programme.desc: Witchcraft, demons and ghosts have all been reported to haunt these caves. Sean investigates this network of tunnels deep underground and uncovers that all is not as it seems. This is not a day out at the seaside at Beech Caves.
programme.sub-title: Not a Very Fun Day at The Beech Caves

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghosts of Bolton Sea Cadets
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team heads to Bolton to check out the alleged haunting at Sea Cadets academy.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunted Weir Mill
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team visits Weir Mill, the oldest and most paranormally active mill in Stockport.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to Derbyshire to investigate the New Mills Arts Theatre. This quirky little building has played host to many famous acts and world-renowned plays but has a little-known secret in that it's allegedly haunted.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 2
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team is ready for act II at the New Mills Arts Theatre. With so much apparent activity happening at this unassuming theatre, the team just couldn't leave when so much more could happen.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits at The Lord Eldon
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to the old town of Knutsford, Cheshire to investigate the historic Lord Eldon Inn, hoping to contact the spirit of Sarah Ann Pollitt who is said to haunt the pub.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Monks and Demons at The Rutland Arms Hotel
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team journeys to Nottingham and the historic Rutland Arms Hotel. The pub and hotel have seen several centuries of change, and with that change came tragedy.
programme.sub-title: Monks and Demons at The Rutland Arms Hotel

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Final Session at Galleries of Justice
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travel back in time to The Galleries of Justice in Nottingham. This was a one stop shop for justice where criminals were held awaiting trial.
programme.sub-title: Final Session at Galleries of Justice

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Underground World Of The City of Caves
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team ventures underground to investigate the City of Caves in Nottingham.
programme.sub-title: Underground World Of The City of Caves

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Lost Souls Of The Tivoli Venue
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team travels to North Wales and the Tivoli Theatre in Flint for a night of haunting entertainment.
programme.sub-title: Lost Souls Of The Tivoli Venue

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Old Glen and Milner Curse
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team heads to Shipley, West Yorkshire to investigate The Old Glen House Pub.
programme.sub-title: The Old Glen and Milner Curse

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team visit Weir Mill, the oldest and most paranormally active mill in Stockport.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive
programme.desc: The team step into a house that has become a legend with the paranormal community, 30 East Drive, Pontefract.
programme.sub-title: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1
programme.desc: The team heads to Lincolnshire to investigate the Village Farm Museum. This location looks out of place, being in the middle of a residential housing estate.
programme.sub-title: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2
programme.desc: This fascinating location sees a twist in the activity with Bex and Sean getting more than they bargained for.
programme.sub-title: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Souls Seeking Solace Gotts Park Mansion
programme.desc: The team encounters a spirit member joining them on the thermal imaging camera and appearing to leave its ghostly hand print behind.
programme.sub-title: Souls Seeking Solace Gotts Park Mansion

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Long Lost Treasure at Jessops Old Mill and Auction House
programme.desc: The ghost dimension team visits Batley, West Yorkshire to investigate a location where it may not be the building that's haunted but the items that reside within.
programme.sub-title: Long Lost Treasure at Jessops Old Mill and Auction House

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 1
programme.desc: Four floors of terror! Objects from around the world are at home in the museum, but what is attached to them, which now roams the floors and corridors after dark?
programme.sub-title: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 2
programme.desc: With activity sending the team into a spin on the top floor, is there something attached to the museum's main attraction, the mummy?
programme.sub-title: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 2

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 16
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a house in Wiltshire, a maisonette in London and revisIt a house in Lancashire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a house in Derbyshire that might need Sherlock Holmes' help and a house in Dover where the walls aren't lasting quite so well as the white cliffs! In South Wales there's a bungalow that will have you wanting to dance all night.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 21
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a colourful terrace in Penryn, an unusual property in Gillingham and revisit some exciting farm buildings in Cheshire that we first visited two years ago.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 9
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a three bedroom house in Essex with unusual features, a roomy flat in Battersea, South London, and an end of terrace house in Liverpool. We see what happens when they go under the hammer!

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 5
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit an end of terrace in Harrogate, a property in Teddington, Middlesex where strong vision is needed and in Derby we reveal the effect of inflation on house prices.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 17
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Dorset that may not look too promising, a house in Hertfordshire and in Derbyshire all is not quiet as it seems.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 19
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin travel to Plymouth to see a cottage that with a lot of TLC could become a gold mine; Nottingham offers a run down home with a lot of room for improvement. Finally on to Chatham where this home really does go 'Under the Hammer'.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 12
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a four bedroomed detached house in Cornwall, a two storey midterrace property in Aberfan, Wales and a two bedroom ground floor flat in a village in East Ayrshire, Ochiltree.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Devon and Birkenhead.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 3
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts see a modern property in the historic village of Lacock in Wiltshire; an ex-local authority terraced house in South Wales; and a three bedroom, end-of-terrace house in Bulwell, in the suburbs of Nottingham.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 14
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a mid terrace in Devon, a house of two halves in Swindon and a lot of flat for very little cash in Selby, Yorkshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy see properties in Ripon and Dover.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a period cottage in Berkshire, a flat in Tottenham and a property in Stoke-on-Trent.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 17
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a cute Berkshire Cottage, a small house in Kent, and a semi-detached fly-invested house in Derbyshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 36
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander & Martin Roberts visit a mid terraced house in Tunbridge, a few rooms up for sale in Torquay and a two bedroomed apartment above a Barbers shop in East London.

programme.title: Pusher
programme.desc: The cult classic from Nicolas Winding Refn (Drive) follows drug pusher Frank as he comes to blows with Copenhagen’s underworld.

programme.title: Supervixens
programme.desc: Clint Ramsey has to flee after his wife is murdered by psycho cop Harry Sledge. While travelling, Clint gets sexually harassed on all sides by various voluptuous nymphomaniacs, and it all ends in a literally explosive climax.

programme.title: Audition
programme.desc: Recent widower Shigharu Aoyama is advised by his son to find a new wife, agreeing Shigeharu seeks the advice of a colleague having been out of the dating scene for many years.

programme.title: Androcles And The Lion
programme.desc: Based on George Bernard Shaw's Roman satire about a Christian tailor's fortuitous friendship with a wild lion.

programme.title: The Hunchback Of Notre Dame
programme.desc: In 15th-century Paris, the brother of the archdeacon plots with the gypsy king to foment a peasant revolt. Meanwhile, a freakish hunchback falls in love with the gypsy queen.

programme.title: The Snows of Kilimanjaro
programme.desc: Writer Harry Street reflects on his life as he lies dying from an infection while on safari in the shadow of Mount Kilamanjaro.

programme.title: Cyrano De Bergerac
programme.desc: The charismatic swordsman-poet helps another woo the woman he loves in this straightforward version of the play.

programme.title: Small Time Crooks
programme.desc: A loser of a crook and his wife strike it rich when a botched bank job's cover business becomes a spectacular success. Starring: Woody Allen, Tracey Ullman, Hugh Grant, Michael Rapaport, Tony Darrow, Laurine Towler

programme.title: The Shape of Things to Come
programme.desc: Sometime in the future, man has set up colonies on the Moon, when Earth becomes uninhabitable. A madman decides to destroy the Moon colonies with his robots and automated ships, and only three people and their robot can stop him.

programme.title: Hunter: Hot Prowl
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall become suspicious when a Bel Air housewife refuses to identify the man who robbed her of a million-dollar necklace.

programme.title: Hunter: Allegra
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the mysterious death of Allegra, Hunter's former girlfriend, to determine if the beautiful young heiress jumped or was pushed from a skyscraper window.

programme.title: Hunter: Renegade
programme.desc: When Hunter investigates a drug ring, his ex-partner, Frank Garriman, becomes a suspect in the murder of the dealers.

programme.title: Hunter: The Black Dahlia
programme.desc: Detective Doyle comes out of retirement to help Hunter and McCall investigate the real-life murder of actress-turned-prostitute Elizabeth Short, who was cut in half 41 years before.

programme.title: Hunter: Not Just Another John Doe
programme.desc: When Hunter and McCall investigate the murder of an unidentified man, their interest is piqued because the victim seemingly never existed -- and the killing appears to be a professional murder.

programme.title: Hunter: Naked Justice - Part 1
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the mysterious death of a famous movie actress and encounter a surviving sister hungry for the inheritance.

programme.title: Hunter: Naked Justice - Part 2
programme.desc: Hunter, investigating the murder of a famous movie actress, follows a contract killer to Mexico and learns why the CIA is interested in the killing.

programme.title: Hunter: Girl on the Beach
programme.desc: Captain Devane tries to take Hunter and McCall off the investigation of his ex-wife's murder and violates his forced leave of absence to pursue the killer himself.

programme.title: Hunter: Bagota's Million
programme.desc: A Colombian drug dealer is murdered and police informant Sporty James becomes the prime suspect, hunted by both Hunter and the criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: Death Signs
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's investigation of the stabbing of a deaf man hinges on cryptic clues the victim gave in sign language before he died.

programme.title: Hunter: Boomerang
programme.desc: The wife of a businessman who was killed in an explosion on his yacht becomes the prime suspect when Hunter and McCall discover that she was recently removed from his will.

programme.title: Hunter: The Fourth Man
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the whereabouts of four million dollars still missing from a six-year-old drug bust that implicates the police in criminal activity.

programme.title: Hunter: Murder He Wrote
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the death of a multi-millionaire, whose four heirs become prime suspects.

programme.title: Hunter: Silver Bullet
programme.desc: The only clue in a series of murders is a trail of police-issued ammunition that leads Hunter and McCall to suspect a colleague as the killer.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: A boy is the only witness to the shooting of his parents. As McCall attempts to unravel the circumstances surrounding the murders, Hunter must get the boy to talk about the shocking incident.

programme.title: Hunter: The Baby Game
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall enter the world of baby brokering when the murdered body of a call girl and an unharmed two-year-old are left in front of the woman's television set.

programme.title: Hunter: Presumed Guilty
programme.desc: McCall finds her loyalties sharply divided when an important murder case being prosecuted by the Assistant District Attorney, with whom she is in love, is jeopardized by Hunter.

programme.title: Hunter: Dead on Target - Part 1
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent suicide of Hunter's friend from the Vietnam War, the pair uncovers a 20-year-old betrayal that is still killing people today.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Olympic rowing gold medalist Matthew Pinsent tests sports cars. Tim tries to discover if manufacturers' economy claims transfer to the real world.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato joins Britain's best downhill skier, Chemmy Alcott, to drive a Group N rally car; Tom Ford drives the Citroen C5 in Lisbon; Tiff takes a look at the latest Subaru Impreza.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason teaches rugby legend and TV personality Matt Dawson how to drift like a hooligan in a 500 horsepower Audi supercar.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Formula 1 stars Johnny Herbert and Karun Chandhok join Tiff and Jason to rank two four-seater powerhouses; Ben Collins is challenged to compete in an autograss event.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jonny embark on a seemingly impossible mission: to drive from Newcastle to Portsmouth in an electric car; Jason Plato takes Britain's latest supercar, the Noble M600, to the track.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny conducts a shocking crash test to find out whether you are safer in the front of a car or in the back.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason and Tiff team up with Ross Noble and Charley Boorman for a series of arduous off-road challenges.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato rips through Italy in Lamborghini's brand new Gallardo Superleggera; Vicki tells us all we need to know about the new Nissan Cube.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato competes in the British Touring Car Championships; Tiff drives one of the fastest and rarest cars on the planet: the £1 million Pagani Zonda R.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki visits the Paris motorshow; Jonny rides shotgun in Europe's fastest street car; Jason teaches Comedy Dave from Radio 1 how to drive like a hero.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny enters his very first track day event.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff talks to Formula legend David Coulthard about the awesome new Mercedes SLS AMG; Jason drives the Ferrari 599 GTO, which may be one of the greatest Ferraris ever produced.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny goes to Spain to drive a supercharged version of the fantastic Lotus Evora; Jason gets his hands on the most powerful Porsche 911 ever.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: 2008 F1 World Champion Lewis Hamilton gives his thoughts on a fantastic new supercar, the McLaren MP4-12C.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff races the stunning Peugeot RCZ; Jonny heads to Germany to take a look at the Nissan Juke; Jason grapples with a powerful American muscle car, the Chevrolet Camaro SS.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki speaks to top car designer Gordon Murray about his latest city car project and the future of urban transport.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny checks out Volvo's testing facility in Sweden to witness a spectacular 50 mph crash test.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason gets to drive the new trek car from British specialists Westfield; guest presenter Robert Llewellyn drives an electric car from Japan.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny hunts for the ultimate estate car, setting his sights on the Skoda Superb Estate and the Volvo 850 T5-R.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki visits the luxury car show Salon Privé and gives exclusive behind-the-scenes access as she judges the Best Supercar award.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: The 2010 "Fifth Gear" awards recognize winners in categories of Best Small Car, Best Family Car, Best Fast Car and Car of the Year.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: "Fifth Gear" newcomer Ben Collins attempts to drive a 700 bhp drag racing beast.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny tests the latest Jeep Wrangler to see how it stacks up against the original WWII model; Tim Shaw tackles the car tax; Jason Plato goes behind the wheel of the new Aston Martin V8 Vantage.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim gives some advice on how to prevent car theft. Tom meets up for some mayhem in a Fiat Qubo with a touring Guns 'n' Roses tribute band.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny attempts to make a profit by buying a scrap car and selling its parts at an auto parts sale; Tiff goes behind the wheel of the Aston Martin DBS.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests the new Grande Punto Abarth; Tim Shaw investigates whether it's possible to save huge amounts of money by going back to basics and servicing your own car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason compete in a quad bike race; Vicki tests the new Alfa Romeo Mito.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim puts a variety of car polishes to the extreme test to simulate a year of abuse.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford test drives the new Ford Fiesta; Vicki and Tiff are aided by renowned trainer Simon Pavey in a motorcycle race.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim takes the driving test again to see if the test really is getting harder or not.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason race each other in monster trucks. Tim finds out if super diesel produces more horsepower than standard diesel. Vicki challenges 17-year-old Tom Cave to a bit of rally racing.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason battle it out on the track in go-karts; Tom Ford tests the Renault Laguna; actor Dick Benedict joins Jonny Smith in a luxury road test.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this packed episode of "Fifth Gear," Tom Ford delivers a verdict on the new Volkswagen Scirocco, Vicki heads to the track to test out Porsches and Tiff tests out the world's first underwater car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford conducts a shocking crash test that could prove to be essential viewing for family motorists; Tim hits the road with the latest camera alerting systems.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford performs the only televised test of the Dodge Challenger; Jonny Smith heads to the Ultimate Street Car show at Santa Pod to judge the "Show & Shine" competition.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In the season finale, "Fifth Gear" visits the Firecracker Banger, an event where even rare classic cars get a glorious, fiery send-off.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Love and desire are powerful currents that surge through human affairs. When they run off course, the results can be deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sacrifice Their Blood
programme.desc: To the outside world these caring mothers present a face of love - a suburban Mom, a caring community member, a housewife - but when the doors close, these deadly women will do whatever it takes to have their own needs met, even destroy their family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sins of the Sister
programme.desc: A sisterly bond can mean a life full of friendship and sibling love. But for some women, having a sister means nothing more then having their own personal meal ticket, scapegoat and combatant. These types of relationships can lead to deadly outcomes.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Revenge is one of the oldest motives for murder, but these cases are much more than an “eye for an eye.”

programme.title: Deadly Women: To Love and to Murder
programme.desc: Marriage is a lifelong commitment of love, and wedding vows. 'To have and to hold; for better, for worse; until death do us part'. But for these monstrous wives, it was only the vow of 'death do us part' they upheld.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes the innocence of childhood is swept away by dark thoughts and violent currents. Deep and disturbing psychological impulses will drive a child to kill another child.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone
programme.desc: Deadly Women are not always the ones you expect. They are not the strangers lurking in the dark, they are a young mother, a supportive wife and a grandmother - all killers. Behind their loving masquerade lies a wake of family horror and pain.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The True Story of Mississippi Burning
programme.desc: Philadelphia, Mississippi, 1964. A sleepy southern town steeped in tradition finds itself targeted for invasion.
programme.sub-title: The True Story of Mississippi Burning

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970's and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Takeover
programme.desc: Two armed bank robbers hit a Seattle bank taking over 150,000 dollars. Before they can escape police confront them and the pair splits up. As authorities search block by block they learn one was a career criminal with a long history of violence.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Bilderbergs

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS TEXTS

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF ANCIENT CULTURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysteries associated with ancient cultures including Lemuria, the Indus Valley civilization of Harappa, the Forgotten Kingdoms of Tibet, the Olmec civilization of Central America.

programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the relics of the saints including the Shrine of the Three Kings, the Tilman of Our Lady of Guadalupe, the Holy Foreskin, the Ark of the Covenant, the Remain of Mary Magdalene, Buddha's Tooth, and the Holy Grail.

programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries explores extraterrestrial phenomena like ship and aircraft vanishings, Area 51, close encounters, classified projects.

programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries examines mysterious creatures that may live in Earth including the chupacabra, the Loch Ness Monster, the thunderbird,) the yeti or Bigfoot.

programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at ancient megastructures including the Olmec Heads of Central America, Moai of Eastern Island, Petra in modern day Jordan, the Alhambra in Spain, Angkor Wat in Cambodia, Chichen Itza.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PLACES WITH HEALING POWERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at places that are said to have healing power including Lourdes where people have been cured by drinking water from a cave, Machu Picchu, Stonehenge, the Dead Sea, the Ganges.

programme.desc: The religious practice known as exorcism is examined as well as claims of demonic possession. Richard travels to a Catholic seminary in Yonkers, New York.

programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: Akhenaten and Nefertiti: The Mummies of the Heretics
programme.desc: The first rumours of a forgotten Pharaoh reached Europe in the middle of the 19th century. In Middle Egypt, near the town of Asyut, Prussian scholar Richard Lepsius made an astonishing discovery.

programme.title: Metropolis Series

programme.title: Metropolis Series

programme.title: Metropolis Series

programme.title: Metropolis Series

programme.desc: Dormant for 700 years, Vesuvius unleashed its full horror.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: In 1323 BC Egypt’s boy-king Tutankhamun died – he was just 18 years old. Hastily mummified he was placed in an unfinished tomb, his existence unknown until the tomb’s sensational rediscovery in 1922. But how and why did Tutankhamun die?

programme.title: Tutankhamun: A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: In 1323 BC Egypt’s boy-king Tutankhamun died – he was just 18 years old. Hastily mummified he was placed in an unfinished tomb, his existence unknown until the tomb’s sensational rediscovery in 1922. But how and why did Tutankhamun die?

programme.title: Cleopatra: Portrait Of A Killer
programme.desc: A tale of sibling rivalry, of lust, incest, murder and power that destroyed an empire. An incredible true story about one of history’s greatest legends and a fight to the death with her sister that no Hollywood fiction could hope to match.

programme.title: Caligula with Mary Beard
programme.desc: Professor Mary Beard embarks on an investigative journey to explore the life and times of one of Rome’s most extraordinary and notorious individuals Gaius Julius Caesar Augustus Germanicus – better known to us as Caligula.

programme.title: Akhenaten and Nefertiti: The Sun was the Only Witness
programme.desc: When Akhanaten became Pharaoh of Egypt, around the year 1360 B.C., he kindled a religious revolution: He wanted to restrict worship to the Sun-god, Atun. Egypt had been a polytheistic realm for more than 2,000 years.
programme.sub-title: The Sun was the Only Witness

programme.title: Akhenaten and Nefertiti: The Curse of Amarna
programme.desc: A new chapter of Egyptian history began with the rule of Pharaoh Akhanaten. His visions would plunge the realm into an unpredictable crisis. By Akhanatens side ruled Queen Nefertiti. Had the Pharaoh succumbed to her magical beauty?

programme.title: Akhenaten and Nefertiti: The Mummies of the Heretics
programme.desc: The first rumours of a forgotten Pharaoh reached Europe in the middle of the 19th century. In Middle Egypt, near the town of Asyut, Prussian scholar Richard Lepsius made an astonishing discovery.

programme.title: Metropolis Series
programme.desc: Athens gave the world its modern political system – the birth of “democracy” is a long and complicated yet utterly galvanizing process. Even the Gods have a say in worldly doings.

programme.title: Metropolis Series
programme.desc: Alexandria, a royal Greek city in the land of the Pharaohs. Along the sandy banks of the Nile delta on the African Mediterranean coast, the most powerful metropolis of its time rose from virtually nothing.

programme.title: Metropolis Series
programme.desc: Carthage came into being as a Phoenician trading base, its strategically favourable location eventually allowing it to develop into a major centre of trade and seafaring. Carthage, Rome‘s fierce adversary, is the gateway to the treasures of Africa.

programme.title: Final 24
programme.desc: Using archive footage, dramatic reenactment, and interviews with his closest companions, Final 24 details the last 24 hours of Jim Morrison’s life.

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix: The Uncut Story: 1942-1961
programme.desc: Part I of this series takes us through Jimi's life in Seattle, Washington where he lived the majority of his twenty-seven years. Through the recollection of his closest friends and family, we enter into the inner world of Jimi's upbringing.

programme.title: Pop Profiles: Snoop Dogg
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to one of the most iconic pop stars of our time: Snoop Dogg. Snoop Dogg's story is told chronologically through his major hit singles. New interviews add insight into the life of Snoop Dogg.

programme.title: Final 24
programme.desc: Final 24 delves into the Prince of Motown’s violent childhood to uncover the root of Marvin’s strained relationship with his strict father and to understand his struggle with drugs.

programme.title: Video Killed the Radio Star: Roxy Music and Brian Ferry
programme.desc: Broadcasters Mark Ellen and Robert Elms discuss the impact of the first four Roxy music albums, in terms of original music, the look of the bank, design of the covers, the consequences of the Eno and Ferry split and the Ferry solo career.

programme.title: Pop Profiles: Jennifer Lopez
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to one of the most iconic pop stars of our time: Jennifer Lopez. Jennifer's story is told chronologically through her major hit singles. New interviews add insight into the life of Jennifer Lopez.

programme.title: Final 24

programme.title: The Big Interview: Weird Al Yankovic
programme.desc: A conversation with a comedy and music genius. Al Yankovic sits down in his home with Dan Rather.

programme.title: The Beatles: A Long and Winding Road

programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to one of the most iconic pop stars of our time: Foo Fighters. Foo Fighters' story is told chronologically through their major hit singles. New interviews add insight into the life of Foo Fighters.

programme.title: The Beatles: A Long and Winding Road

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lynsey Quy
programme.desc: Lynsey Quy a young mother and wife mysteriously vanishes on Christmas day, her husband reports her missing, the police start their search.

programme.desc: A quaint New Jersey town is rocked when a local nurse, Betty Cornish, is found bludgeoned to death in her apartment.

programme.title: Are You Haunted Special: Tutbury Castle Special
programme.desc: Filmed over two nights, this special episode sees the AYH investigating historical Tutbury Castle. The team are joined by their very special guest Lesley Smith, historian, and castle custodian. And Dale has a rather emotional encounter.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "A very strange place"
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team investigates a venue with some amazing history and some bizarre incidents. Everything from unexplained footsteps to apparitions has been witnessed here; and for two members of the crew, it will be a venue they won't forget.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Is that you?"

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "It came from near the door!"

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Unfinished business
