programme.desc: After giving Holly’s new boyfriend Paul a hard time, the guys make amends and Paul invites them to the party of a lifetime. But on the way, Stuart discovers that Paul’s ex-wife might still be in the picture.

programme.title: The Exes: Sister Act
programme.desc: Desperate to impress her perfect sister Jill, Holly invents an alternative lifestyle for herself that quickly spirals out of control. Meanwhile, the guys are riding high on a "special" dish cooked up by Stuart.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil's client, tennis star Chuck Feeney, stays with the guys to hide from the paparazzi. But Chuck the ladies' man turns out to be more of a man's man. Haskell and Holly compete over who can take better care of pregnant Eden.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys accidentally break Holly's vibrator, they scramble to fix it before she finds out so it doesn't ruin their friendship.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly's boyfriend Paul orders the guys to not hang out with her when he's around. When Holly discovers what Paul did, she's forced to choose between poker night and date night.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell's ex-wife Margo gets amnesia after an accident and stays with Haskell to recover, only she thinks they're still married. Phil and Stuart spend the night in Holly's place and get to know her intimate sleeping behavior.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly despairs about dating again, the guys secretly create an online dating profile for her and discover what dating is like from a woman's perspective.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell's ex-wife Margo gets amnesia after an accident and stays with Haskell to recover, only she thinks they're still married. Phil and Stuart spend the night in Holly's place and get to know her intimate sleeping behavior.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Phil and Holly make a pact to ask their bosses for raises, Phil gets fired. Holly tries to help Phil get his job back. Stuart's integrity is tested when he dates a British woman with repulsive teeth.
programme.sub-title: Take This Job and Shove It

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly and Eden date two charming French men who shower them with gifts and glamorous living, they wonder if their dream dates are too good to be true. Phil and Haskell train Stuart on how to confront a bully at the bar.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil opens his own agency and enlists Eden as his temporary assistant to help sign his first client. Meanwhile, Holly hires Haskell as her temporary assistant. Stuart pursues the Yelper who smeared his practice's perfect rating.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates a much younger man and Eden questions his motives. Phil and Eden secretly become friends with benefits. Stuart convinces Haskell to pursue a woman he's admired from afar and ends up accidentally stealing her cat.
programme.sub-title: The Hand That Rocks the Cradle

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly attends her ex-boyfriend Paul's wedding and throws it into chaos. At the wedding Phil and Eden realize they're developing feelings for each other. Haskell sets his sights on the most desperate woman at the wedding.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Eden shares a secret about herself and Phil with Holly, who blabs to Stuart and Haskell, testing boundaries within the group.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart's sister Nicki (Leah Remini) shows up with some shocking news about her marriage. Phil and Eden consider bringing a guest into the bedroom.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Murph persuades Oscar to try online dating, Oscar finds himself on a blind date with Felix's ex-wife, Ashley (Christine Woods).

programme.desc: Oscar is forced to choose between his romantic plans with Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) and helping to save Felix's relationship as Emily decides to extend her stay in London.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Miss England

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 89
programme.desc: A fraudulent check stamps a stop payment on a 40 year friendship and working relationship with sketchy circumstances that has Judge Rhonda smelling a con.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 92
programme.desc: A brother on the lam from an arrest warrant that landed him in jail for 32 months blames his sister for the loss of all of his worldly possessions and Judge Rhonda has a chat with his mother about pulling this family back together.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 86
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend's ex attacks her cousin's car, the woman facing Judge Rhonda wishes she had gone to the store instead of this dude's house for a glass of wine.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 109
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda tries to close the gap between two close cousins argue over Major, the pure bread Doberman that one was going to send to stud and the other got neutered.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 19
programme.desc: A car note and flirting drives a wedge between two married women; can Judge Rhonda build back the trust?

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: His older sister bailed him out of jail after he was jumped by three guys and he tells Judge Rhonda that he doesn't need to pay her back because he had two other friends who would have bailed him out for free.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 83
programme.desc: Cousins who were like sisters claim one social media post has put a fork in their relationship and want Judge Rhonda to decide if the damage can be repaired.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 58
programme.desc: When her cousin got out of jail on a theft charge, she tells Judge Rhonda that the list of what he owes her for rent, a cell phone, and her wrecked car is almost as long as his rap sheet.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 10
programme.desc: A husband's affair with his wife's cousin is revealed when a valuable collection is stolen from their car and Judge Rhonda settles the score.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 110
programme.desc: Sisters dance apart in Judge Rhonda's courtroom when the one who owns the dance & fitness studio stops paying the other.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 52
programme.desc: A tattoo "addiction" has drawn out the conflict between an older woman and her estranged young husband; Judge Rhonda inks them a solution.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 150
programme.desc: Family squabbles can become destructive, especially when money is involved.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: It's a real dogfight when cousins clash over who gets to keep adorable pooch Odie; and Judge Rhonda recruits a local deputy to deliver the dog whichever way she rules.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: First cousins who were more like sisters hit the rocks over a cruise that one paid for after the other's car exploded in flames; Judge Rhonda wades through this inferno to try to land these two on the beach.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 90
programme.desc: When her marriage falls apart after three months of alcohol abuse, this single mom wants Judge Rhonda to make her estranged husband pay for their divorce.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 130
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda confronts a marriage on-the-rocks with accusations of cheating on both sides, drug-use and a baby caught in the middle.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 16
programme.desc: A shady Food Truck deal drives cousins into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 96
programme.desc: Sisters who share a rollercoaster existance of ups and downs traded their beloved dog Mini and now that both are stable they need Judge Rhonda to decide who will provide Mini's forever home.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 26
programme.desc: One sister's Hot Girl Summer was more important to her than paying rent, so the other sister drags them both to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 48
programme.desc: When a man brings his transgender fiance into court, Judge Rhonda confronts his mom who may be the cause of their dispute.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 57
programme.desc: A comedian claims his cousin the canibus festival promoter didn't pay for his performance; Judge Rhonda weeds through the facts for her verdict.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 40
programme.desc: Godbrothers argue over an apartment loan and a surprise secret witness turns the tables in Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 93
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda is shocked by a DJ who claims that when a cousin who has been doing her hair since middle school, braided her head so tightly that her scalp was bleeding and scabby, she suffered hair-loss and now has a big bald spot.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 47
programme.desc: Comedian Kung Fu Panda claims his sister paid no rent and tried to poison him with her cooking, Judge Rhonda digs into the hot meal vs. free rent controversy.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 112
programme.desc: When a cousin's ex becomes his new boyfriend, Judge Rhonda has to sort through the mess of loans, baby supplies, broken car windows, burned up pies and a cut up wig.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 80
programme.desc: An identical twin and her mother accuse a twin sister of burning down her own home for the insurance money in Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 49
programme.desc: When a Funk Trap singer moves to the ATL to level up his music career, Judge Rhonda is faced with a song and dance about sold furniture, an unpaid phone bill, and an old tune called Rent.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 140
programme.desc: Brothers face Judge Rhonda through the lens of a broken camera that the younger one claims the older brother destroyed on an alcohol-fueled day at the lake.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A couple together for eight years share a son and a home, but when she finds out he has another child and other women Judge Rhonda is called into play.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 65
programme.desc: When an older sister became the legal "mother" for her two young sisters, she and her husband paid all of their bills; now that one is a grown exotic dancer, money makes them face Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 63
programme.desc: Twin sisters who lost their parents as pre-teens are chopped apart by finances and jealousy and Judge Rhonda must decode the anger over caring for a toddler to pull their sisterhood back together.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 37
programme.desc: Two comedians with the same last name find out they are halfbrothers when they happen to work together, but a rude joke about one of their mothers brings them into Judge Rhonda's courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 31
programme.desc: A nearly fatal truck collision drives cousins into Judge Rhonda's Court where an accident reconstruction expert reveals forensic results.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda tries to tie cousins back together who are at the end of their rope when expensive rock climbing equipment seems to fall off a cliff.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 32
programme.desc: Bullying and an old family vehicle drive two once-estranged cousins apart again, causing them to crash into Judge Rhonda's courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A two-month courtship led to an eight-month marriage which brought two old friends into Judge Rhonda's court fighting about stimulus money and a child custody lawyer.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda reveals the DNA results to siblings who clash over money and the paternity of one of the brother's six children.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 144
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces an angry Mom who claims her daughter spent her $5,000 gift for college rent on tattoos.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 92
programme.desc: A brother on the lam from an arrest warrant that landed him in jail for 32 months blames his sister for the loss of all of his worldly possessions and Judge Rhonda has a chat with his mother about pulling this family back together.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 28
programme.desc: Mother and Daughter face off in Judge Rhonda's courtroom over a secret breast augmentation surgery.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 27
programme.desc: Cousins clash over a broken pullout bed, sleeping crooked and stolen diet pills today in Judge Rhonda's court.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 70
programme.desc: When Sassy the dog turns up missing after a night filled with old and new boyfriends, Judge Rhonda faces former sisters-inlaw growling with anger and grief.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Two cousins, Westside and Scoob, bring a car that looks like a shark bit the front bumper into Judge Rhonda's court with a mystery story about how the damage occured.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A couple in crisis comes to Judge Rhonda's court looking for answers about co-parenting their children after drugs, alcohol and infidelity have poisoned their relationship.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Lucky Strike
programme.desc: A man driving with a wooden stake in his head dies in front of a casino.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Crash and Burn
programme.desc: An elderly woman crashes her car into a crowded restaurant. One of the patrons is Sara's paramedic boyfriend. Grissom and Nick investigate the possible carbon monoxide murder of a woman in her home.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Precious Metal
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick, and Sara investigate a seemingly months old body found in the mountains.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Night At The Movies
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate a movie-goer who was stabbed to death.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Last Laugh
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the murder of a despised comic who died onstage, apparently after drinking from a tainted bottle of water.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Forever
programme.desc: The trampling death of a trainer by her horse aboard a private jet is investigated by Grissom, Catherine, and Nick. Sara and Warrick look into a Romeo and Juliet scenario in the desert.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: A casino is brutally robbed by four trigger-happy men wearing wigs. Painstaking identification efforts lead to ex-con serial killer Tammy Felton and accomplices, but one by one they are found murdered themselves.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Ellie
programme.desc: The investigation of the death of a petty con man and drug mule leads the CSI team to Brass' daughter Ellie.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Organ Grinder
programme.desc: When businessman Robert Fairmont is found almost dead in a hotel elevator, the CSI team assume the case. They find evidence of heavy metal poisoning. When they look for the corpse, it has been cremated and the organs donated.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: You’ve Got Male
programme.desc: When a young woman riding a horse finds a body of a woman inside a pipe in a construction site, Grissom and his team investigate the murder. Soon they find another woman's body and coroner Dr. Albert 'Al' Robbins notes that the women were sisters.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Finger
programme.desc: Wealthy Roy Logan acts suspiciously when withdrawing $1m cash with blood on his hands, but must be released for lack of a crime. When Catherine rushes after him with his spectacles, she gets a phone call saying Logan's lover Amanda Freeman was kidnapped.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Primum Non Nocere
programme.desc: An ice hockey player dies during a game.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Felonius Monk
programme.desc: Grissom studies Ananda's Vegas Buddhist monastery where four Thai monks were fatally shot in the forehead. Forensics also show the presence of hostile restaurant owner Peter Hutchins Sr. and his son, Pete Jr.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Chasing The Bus
programme.desc: A tour bus heading to Las Vegas skids off the highway, leading to many deaths and even more injuries. The team suspects that this was no mere accident.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Cats In The Cradle
programme.desc: An old lady is found dead with a stab wound in her chest. There are over 20 cats in her house.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Anatomy Of A Lye
programme.desc: Grissom and Sidle investigate the death of someone who was buried in a shallow grave in a park and covered in lye.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Cross-jurisdictions
programme.desc: An ex-CSI chief is murdered in his house after a wild party for the rich and famous. His wife and young daughter are taken hostage in Miami. Catherine and Warrick follow the trail and work with Caine and his team to solve the case

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Hunger Artist
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found in a shopping cart, wrapped in a blanket with her mutilated face protruding out. The woman was a model named Ashley James whose face can be found all over Las Vegas, on billboards and magazine covers.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Revenge Is Best Served Cold
programme.desc: A world-famous poker champion drops dead in the middle of a game. He appears to have had a heart attack. Outside of the city, Nick and Catherine investigate the death of a young street racer.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Accused Is Entitled
programme.desc: Hollywood sex symbol Tom Haviland admits to having sex with a girl who is found dead in his casino hotel bedroom with her throat fatally pierced with a corkscrew. His lawyer demands a near-instant trial, leaving CSI almost no time to work.

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: An elderly woman is found brutally murdered in her upper-middle-class home, an apparent victim of a robbery gone wrong. As Lethbridge Police Detective Ryan Stef investigates, he uncovers a web of lies that implicates a shocking suspect.

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: A young couple are bludgeoned to death in their Hamilton, Ontario, home in front of the woman's three-year-old son. The detective attempts to build a rapport with the child in order to solve the case.

programme.title: A Life in Crime: Jackie Malton
programme.desc: Retired DCI Jackie Malton tells the story of her rise to become one of the most respected police detectives of her generation and the inspiration for the hit TV drama 'Prime Suspect'.

programme.title: A Life in Crime: Donal MacIntyre
programme.desc: For more than 30 years, Donal MacIntyre has worked as a hard-hitting investigative reporter and has risked his life on more than one occasion to shine a light on the darkest corners of the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Murder Wall
programme.desc: In the early hours, police deliver horrible news to parents: their two sons have been attacked in a senseless beating while returning home from a night out.

programme.title: Murder Wall
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of an apparent suicide in her home.

programme.title: Murder Wall
programme.desc: When a dishevelled toddler is found alone wandering the streets, police return him home where they discover a murder scene.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Darlington to investigate the case of Pater Chapman, dubbed `The Facebook Killer'.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: An arrogant Bournemouth hotelier called Peter Taylor gets away with murdering his wife in 1982, but when he conspires to kill his son-in-law nine years later, his luck runs out.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: When Danny Dyke tried playing the hardened drug dealer, he found himself in over his head, but it was his murderers that ended up having sleepless nights.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: When Margaret McOnie is found dead on the cliff tops, a nationwide manhunt followed. Her murderer would soon be revealed as a deadly conman and a double murderer.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: When Linda Anders is found dead at home, her wheelchair-bound husband Malcolm claims an intruder broke in. Police findings quickly change the course of the investigation.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Charlotte Pinkney vanished from Ilfracombe after going to a party. Police launched a murder hunt when her handbag was found in undergrowth - would they find the perpetrator?

programme.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective
programme.desc: When a college student was found dead in rural Quebec, police refused to call it a murder, but years later, her brother continues his own investigation into her death. On the eve of a trip to return to the scene of the crime, tragedy strikes again.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective
programme.desc: A young man leaves home for the corner store but dies on a rainy pavement just down the street. While bystanders claim that he fell off his bike, his mum and sister do not buy it and hit the streets to find answers.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective
programme.desc: A young man whose childhood is marked by tragedy learns of a relatively unknown serial killer and finds himself thinking about unidentified victims. It isn't long before that the pursuit becomes a full-time job and identifying victims an obsession.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective
programme.desc: A young mother is found unresponsive in bed, and her cause of death is determined to be an accidental heroin overdose, but her family has more questions than answers and launches their own investigation.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective
programme.desc: A young girl's life was thrown into chaos when her single mother died by a gunshot wound in their remote mountain home. The journey for the truth will be long and arduous and it'll be thirty years until justice will finally be served.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Citizen Detective
programme.desc: Searching for answers from her own troubled past, one woman sets out on a journey to uncover the identities of four unidentified bodies found inside barrels in the woods, a mystery that had plagued law enforcement for years.

programme.title: Hitler's War: Normandy to The Rhine
programme.desc: Normandy To The Rhine: The Western Allies of World War II launched the largest amphibious invasion in history when they assaulted Normandy, on 6 June 1944.

programme.title: Hitler's War: The Battle For Berlin
programme.desc: The Battle for Berlin: An insight into secret Nazi attempts to turn the tide of war as Berlin crumbled.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: Rise of The Bomber
programme.desc: Rise of the Bomber: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: War Without Boundaries
programme.desc: War Without Boundaries: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: The Means To Victory
programme.desc: The Means to Victory: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: The World At War
programme.desc: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: By Night & By Day
programme.desc: By Night & By Day: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: Terror of The World
programme.desc: Terror of the World: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: The Plane That Led D-Day: Part 1
programme.desc: On 5 June 1944, a C-47 paratrooper aircraft nicknamed 'That’s All, Brother' took off from England to drop Allied fighting men into Normandy. But, post-War she disappeared. A chance discovery in 2015 led a scramble to save the aircraft.

programme.title: The Plane That Led D-Day: Part 2
programme.desc: On 5 June 1944, a C-47 paratrooper aircraft nicknamed 'That’s All, Brother' took off from England to drop Allied fighting men into Normandy. But, post-War she disappeared. A chance discovery in 2015 led a scramble to save the aircraft.

programme.title: The Plane That Led D-Day: Part 3
programme.desc: On 5 June 1944, a C-47 paratrooper aircraft nicknamed 'That’s All, Brother' took off from England to drop Allied fighting men into Normandy. But, post-War she disappeared. A chance discovery in 2015 led a scramble to save the aircraft.

programme.title: Memories of D-Day
programme.desc: 6 June 1944: Operation Overlord begins. Discover D-Day through the eyes of the British Soldiers. In this film, photographs collected by four soldiers allow us to better understand the battle that occurred while reconquering occupied territory.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Ranged Weapons
programme.desc: Ranged weapons guarantee a warrior's best chance of survival. International experts survey history’s most important ranged weapons, from the Roman spear and the English longbow, right up to the futuristic railgun.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Attack From Above
programme.desc: Examining how warfare entered a new dimension as attacks from the skies became possible with weapons from incendiary arrows to drones.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Close Combat
programme.desc: Weapons experts test the physical and psychological impact of close combat weapons - the Roman short sword, the medieval war hammer and the bayonet.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Weapons For All
programme.desc: From the crossbow to the Kalashnikov to 3D-printed firearms, weaponry designed for everyone can offer a decisive advantage in warfare.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Faster Than The Enemy
programme.desc: In spectacular experiments, a team of international experts presents the most significant cases in the history of weapons where speed has made a decisive difference.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Power Of Destruction, The
programme.desc: New weapons with devastating force shape the wars of the 20th century. International experts test the catastrophic effects of the three most destructive weapons of our time: the machine gun, hand grenade and tank.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: War At Sea
programme.desc: A look at key maritime weapons such as the secret super-weapon that kept Constantinople safe for centuries, the thunderous force of a ship's cannon, and the deadly torpedo.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: The Ambush
programme.desc: Examining how the techniques of ambush, along with weapons that remained undetected until the very moment they were used, would revolutionise warfare.

programme.desc: A man encounters spirits in his dreams, and a teen deals with demonic messages.
